description: Provides commands and events for process management within the Bun runtime.

types.description: Unique identifier for a spawned process.
Environment variables as a flat array of key/value strings. [key1, value1, key2, value2, ...]

parameters.name: argv
parameters.description: Command line arguments. Defaults to empty array.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Working directory for the process. Defaults to current working directory.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Environment variables for the process. If not specified, inherits from parent process.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in milliseconds after which the process will be killed. 0 means no timeout.

returns.name: processId
returns.description: Unique identifier for the spawned process.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Identifier of the process to kill.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Signal to send to the process. Defaults to 'SIGTERM'.

commands.name: write
commands.description: Writes data to a process's stdin.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Identifier of the process to write to.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data to write to the process's stdin.

events.name: stdio
events.description: Fired when a process produces output on stdout or stderr.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The stdio data from the process.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Identifier of the process that produced the data.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: The stdio stream that produced the data.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The stdio data as a string.

events.name: exited
events.description: Fired when a spawned process exits.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: Identifier of the process that exited.
